_description: Mobile template: create a new governed loop via async inbox dispatch.
_usage: POST /inbox/enqueue with prompt field populated from this template.

payload.prompt:
Create a new loop with the following details:

- Name: <LOOP-NAME-YYYYMMDD>
- Objective: <one-line objective>
- Horizon: <now|later|future>
- Execution readiness: <runnable|blocked>
- Priority: <low|medium|high|critical>

Use loops.create with --name and --objective flags. Report the loop ID and scope file path when done.

example_filled.prompt:
Create a new loop with the following details:

- Name: LOOP-BACKUP-ROTATION-AUDIT-20260303
- Objective: Audit and normalize backup rotation schedules across all VMs
- Horizon: later
- Execution readiness: blocked
- Priority: medium

Use loops.create with --name and --objective flags. Report the loop ID and scope file path when done.
